query: direct on-camera flash snapshot harsh shadow red eye unflattering party
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: harsh flash — direct on-camera flash, red-eye, party snapshot aesthetic, hard shadows, unflattering documentary realism

response.objective_caption: A chest-level selfie of a young man with short brown hair, wearing a light blue and white striped dress shirt and a blue patterned tie, grinning broadly at the camera with his teeth visible. He holds the camera at arm's length in an indoor room with cream-colored walls, a window with closed blinds, and light wood cabinetry visible in the background.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A chest-level selfie of a young man with short brown hair, wearing a light blue and white striped dress shirt and a blue patterned tie, grinning broadly at the camera with his teeth visible. The background of the indoor room, which includes cream-colored walls, a window with closed blinds, and light wood cabinetry, is heavily distorted by radial motion blur that creates a spinning, disorienting effect around the subject's relatively sharp face. The entire scene is suffused with a sickly yellow-orange cast that lends the skin tones and room surfaces an unhealthy, jaundiced appearance reminiscent of sodium vapor lighting.
